questions.question: Please provide Name shown in the first header row.
Please provide Primary email shown in the contact rows.
Please provide Target role or direction shown in the final header row.
Please provide Date range shown in the project table.
Please provide Project or initiative name.
Please provide Role label shown on the project row.
Please provide Bullets describing contribution and impact.
Please provide School name for each education entry.
Please provide Degree label for each education entry.
Please provide Major for each education entry.
Please provide Optional second-language name shown beside the main name.
Please provide Phone number shown in the contact rows.
Please provide GitHub or portfolio link if it strengthens the resume.
Please provide Two or more short summary bullets.
Please provide Repeatable skill lines that stay profession-neutral.
Please provide Date range for each work experience row.
Please provide Company or organization name for each work row.
Please provide Role title for each work row.
Please provide Bullets describing responsibilities or impact for each work entry.
Please provide Short stack or descriptor line shown in the meta row.
Please provide Date range for each education entry.
